STMicroelectronics Ltd. is a global independent semiconductor company and a leader in developing and delivering semiconductor solutions across wide range of application with net revenues of US$9.85 billion in 2006 and market leadership that is spread across many fields. With staff strength of over 50,000, STMicroelectronics offers a fully integrated range of services including manufacturing, designing, development, sales and marketing. To cope with our aggressive business expansion, we invite high caliber talents to join us.
